claim_support.reason: Most claims are well-supported by the provided evidence chunks and calculation objects. However, the characterization of sequential quarterly growth as 'Year-over-Year' is not supported by the visible source data periods (which only show 2025 quarters), making the conclusion technically unsupported despite the calc object label.

numerical_accuracy.reason: Severe error in financial metric definition. The report repeatedly labels Quarter-over-Quarter (QoQ) growth rates (comparing Q1, Q2, Q3 2025) as 'Year-over-Year' (YoY). This misrepresentation is material as it changes the investment interpretation of performance momentum versus annual performance. The visible source data lacks prior year figures to support a YoY claim.

citation_precision.reason: Structured cited chunk IDs and calc IDs accurately correspond to the content in each paragraph. No mismatches found between the authoritative citations and the report text.

temporal_validity.reason: All dates align with the report as-of date (2025-11-12). Financial periods (Q3 2025 ending Sep 30) and news events (Nov 12, 2025) are temporally valid and do not contain post-as-of claims.

consistency.reason: The report is internally consistent in its terminology (consistently using 'YoY' for sequential data), but this terminology is inconsistent with the provided source data periods (Q1-Q3 2025 only) and standard financial definitions, creating a consistency gap between the report and the underlying data reality.
